title: 趣味、特技、休日の過ごし方

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has received a request to be
interviewed for a magazine article.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
"A special one-on-one feature on the private life
of one of the most popular Umamusume today..."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if I'm really interesting enough for a
feature...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... A little...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It seems like they picked me after multiple
requests from my fans. But...
choice_data_list: I'm happy to help if I can.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That should ease my mind a fair bit. I'm not
confident that I'll be able to respond well, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I help Silence Suzuka prepare for her interview. I
figure I can shoot her a number of questions
similar to what she's been asked in past
interviews.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay. Let's begin.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hobbies? Well, um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Running... I suppose.
choice_data_list: Do you have any special skills?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Skills? ...Running.
choice_data_list: ...How do you spend your time off?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well... On my days off, I like to go running...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list:
We're kind of lacking in the variety
department...

We're kind of lacking in the variety
department...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wh-what should I do?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Just what on earth do my fans want to know
about me?
choice_data_list: They want to get to know the real Suzuka.
Maybe we can change how you answer the questions.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The real me...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So that means... the answers I gave you just now
are okay the way they are?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no question that Silence Suzuka's fans are
enchanted by her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I assure her that they're bound to be delighted
to hear her honest answers.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You think so?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If they really want to know the real me...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Then I'm sure it will be fine. I'll try to answer with
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She concludes that she can approach this and
future press encounters with uncomplicated
sincerity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I learn that Silence Suzuka's
interview was well received for its insight into how
much she loves running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: How I answer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her how, even if her answer is the
same, changing the way she says it will give a
different impression.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... So...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Instead of just saying I like running, I should
mention something like how I like searching for
beautiful scenery as I run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
As for special skills... I can say I'm good at running
long distances.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And on my days off, I like searching for new
places to go running...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I-is that close to what you mean?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Really? Thank goodness. Interviews really are
difficult, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I learn that Silence Suzuka's
interview was well received for its insight into how
she's always thinking about running.
